title: taraxacum glaucophyllum
intro: Taraxacum glaucophyllum, also known as the mountain dandelion or blue milk dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly due to its high content of flavonoids, sesquiterpenes, and alkaloids. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum glaucophyllum have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, inflammation, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which have been used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
